aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Thomas Reliable Services due to significant gaps in structured data and AI-optimized content.
quick_wins: Create and embed an FAQ schema with common HVAC queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is not found, making the business invisible to Google AI and local search.
critical_issues: Google Business Profile is not set up.
Lack of GBP photos, posts, and Q&A to build local engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Expand NAP citations to reputable HVAC directories.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance tasks.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and AI-optimized content.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries and preventive maintenance advice.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Setting up a Google Business Profile and adding LocalBusiness schema.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as HVAC experts by creating in-depth content on maintenance and energy efficiency.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for ChatGPT and Google AI.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their Google Business Profile is not found, and their website lacks critical schema markup.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement AEO strategies, including schema markup, GBP optimization, and conversational content, to make their business AI-friendly.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimized for AI are already capturing market share; the longer they wait, the more they risk losing.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Thomas Reliable Services!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to make your business stand out to AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven growth.
